# Sweet Dreams Media - Business Media Solutions

> Sweet Dreams is a full-service business media agency based in Fort Wayne, Indiana. We specialize in commercial video production, brand films, web development, social media growth, and strategic business partnerships.

## Company Information

- **Business Name**: Sweet Dreams Music LLC (DBA Sweet Dreams Media)
- **Location**: 3943 Parnell Ave, Fort Wayne, IN 46805
- **Phone**: (260) 450-7739
- **Email**: jayvalleo@sweetdreams.us
- **Website**: https://sweetdreams.us
- **Founded**: 2020
- **Founder**: Jay Val Leo

## Services

### Commercial Video Production
Professional video production services including commercials, brand films, corporate videos, event coverage, and promotional content for businesses throughout Fort Wayne and Northeast Indiana.
- URL: https://sweetdreams.us/media

### Web Development
Custom website design and development for businesses and brands, including e-commerce, portfolio sites, and ongoing maintenance.
- URL: https://sweetdreams.us/solutions

### Social Media Growth
Strategic social media management, content creation, and audience growth services for businesses.
- URL: https://sweetdreams.us/solutions

### Business Partnerships
Performance-based growth partnerships with revenue-tied compensation. Unlimited content, brand assets, and social media management.
- URL: https://sweetdreams.us/partnerships

## Key Pages

- Portfolio: https://sweetdreams.us/work
- About Us: https://sweetdreams.us/about
- Book a Call: https://sweetdreams.us/book
- Blog: https://sweetdreams.us/blog

## Service Area

Fort Wayne, Indiana and surrounding Northeast Indiana region. Also serves clients across Indiana and nationwide for digital services.

## Sister Site

For music production, recording studio services, and artist profiles, visit https://sweetdreamsmusic.com
